comment: "I liked the set up and system of presentations of the modules. These helped me to appreciate the indications and factors to consider for primary surgery in breast cancer. Also, understanding the various surgical options for breast itself, the options for surgical management of the axilla, and appreciation of the complications of breast surgery and the prevention and post-op management."
"Very good course. I can say any postgraduate candidate will benefit from it very well."
"This course its a great and focuses on very advanced technology to save lives."
"This course gives the clear guidelines for cancer breast treatment."
